summary: Added tests/test_longtail.py — 8 stdlib-only unittest regression tests pinning the MVP: 3,458 default records, 2,595 tags / 1,345 singletons, seed-42 rare reproduces trout/Rebeyrolle/12338, show 12338 valid JSON, seeded tail, nonzero exit on missing ID, --data override with Met fixture, closed-pipe survival. Writing the pipe test exposed a real defect (BrokenPipeError on `tags | head`), fixed by restoring default SIGPIPE handling in longtail.py. All 8 tests pass.
next: Run 11: either address the highlight-proxy limitation (every Tate record is long-tail since isHighlight is always False — consider a proxy such as Turner-Bequest vs rest, or on-display metadata if present in the snapshot) or begin final-report preparation per JUDGING.md.
